name: Oyster Croquettes
recipeIngredient: 24 Shucked & patted dry oyster (for deep frying)
recipeInstructions:
(Makes 24.) Melt 1/4 cup butter in a heavy medium saucepan over low heat.
Whisk in 1/4 cup flour and stir for 3 minutes. Whisk in milk and bring to boil.
Reduce heat and simmer, stirring occasionally, for 5 minutes. Season with salt
and pepper.
Melt 3 tablespoons butter in a heavy medium skillet over medium-low heat.
Add shallots and cook until softened, stirring occasionally, about 5 minutes.
Add mushrooms, increase heat and cook until all liquid evaporates, stirring
occasionally, about 10 minutes. Season with salt and pepper. Stir mushroom
mixture into sauce. Cool.
Heat skillet over medium-high heat. Add oysters and toss for 2 minutes.
Cool. Heat oil to 425°F in a deep fryer or heavy large saucepan. Beat eggs
together with 1 tablespoon vegetable oil. Pack the sauce around each oyster,
forming a cigar shape. Dredge in flour, shaking off excess. Dip in egg
mixture. Roll in bread crumbs. Fry in batches until golden brown, about 4 minutes.
Remove using a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels. Arrange croquettes on a platter. Garnish with watercress and lemon wedges.
